title: cyperus expansus
intro: Cyperus expansus, also known as umbrella papyrus or papyrus sedge, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the sedge family, characterized by its unique umbrella-shaped inflorescence. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus expansus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
